title: potato pc optimisation
description: the best optimisations to get your potato pc running java
body: If you’re struggling to get smooth gameplay on your low-end PC, this list of 21 carefully selected mods is exactly what you need. Each mod has been chosen to optimize your game to the absolute maximum, working together seamlessly to improve performance without sacrificing too much visual quality. Even if your system is a potato by today’s standards, these mods are designed to help you gain at least 50 guaranteed extra frames per second, making your gameplay much smoother and more enjoyable. The collection includes tweaks that reduce unnecessary graphical effects, optimize textures, improve CPU and GPU efficiency, and streamline in-game assets that normally bog down performance. Beyond just raw FPS gains, many of these mods also enhance loading times, reduce stuttering, and fix small inefficiencies in how the game handles memory, which can make a huge difference on older hardware. Best of all, the mods are compatible with each other, so you don’t have to worry about conflicts or crashes. Whether you’re exploring vast open worlds, engaging in fast-paced combat, or running demanding mods on top of the base game, these 21 mods work as a complete package to ensure your game runs as smoothly as possible, giving you a much more responsive, enjoyable, and lag-free experience.
